expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, scenarios explicitly distinguish multiple dashboard-level export entry points ("Dashboard-level export path ... Export menu" and "... context menu entry point"), include option-combination scenarios ("option combination A" and "option combination B"), and verify visible completion outcomes ("completion outcome is visible and unambiguous", "failure outcome is visible and actionable", plus success/progress/toast/banner/status checks).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The produced file is titled "Phase 4a — Scenario Draft (Subcategory-only)" and uses a subcategory-only, nested scenario structure (bullets with atomic action chains and observable verifications). execution_notes.md also states: "Kept subcategory-first structure; no top-level canonical categories (per phase4a forbidden structure)."
